title: Dreamscene Pink Throw Blanket, Soft Cosy Warm Throws for Sofas Bed Settee Honeycomb Waffle Fleece Blanket Fluffy Throws for Beds Double Faux Fur Throw, Blush Pink - 150 x 200cm
features: Double Fleece Blanket: Featuring a sophisticated honeycomb waffle texture in a soft blush pink colour, this throw blanket adds a chic touch to any living space, from your sofa to the bed. Its neutral hue complements any decor style effortlessly.

150 x 200cm: This bed throw double size is perfectly sized for double beds, sofas or even as a bedspread. Its ample coverage ensures maximum comfort, making it ideal for relaxing with loved ones or simply enjoying some personal downtime.

Lightweight Yet Warm: This lightweight double bed throw provides the ideal balance of warmth and comfort without being too heavy. Perfect for all seasons, it offers cosy warmth during cooler months and can be used year-round for added comfort.

Super Soft & Cosy Fleece: Made with premium fleece materials 100% polyester with 230gsm waffle fleece, this double blanket offers an ultra-soft and warm feel, perfect for lounging on your sofa or adding extra comfort to your double bed and it provides luxurious cosiness for any season. The winter blanket is machine washable at 40°C and quick-drying, this fleece throw is designed for everyday use.

Great Gift Idea for Any Occasion: A thoughtful and practical gift for Birthdays, Housewarmings, Anniversaries, Valentines Days, Fathers Days, Mothers Day, Christmas or Holidays. This fleece throw makes a thoughtful and practical gift, providing comfort and elegance in one beautiful package. Its softness, durability, and beautiful colour ensure it will be used and appreciated every day.
